patches_applied.description: Added chromaticity bridge to Gaia argument — pre-empts the defender's 'systematic refraction preserves relative astrometry' counter. Gaia optical/VLBI radio agreement at microarcsecond precision falsifies any large n(r). Cross-refs WIN-016.

Removed dismissive editorial framing from TLDR: 'the review structure, not the geometry, is what makes it interesting to evaluate.' Replaced with: 'This review evaluates every claimed prediction against independent data and the model's own internal consistency.'
